preferred_translation: basis of power grounded in desire
definition: One of the four bases of power, defined by its leading support in practice.
notes: Use this minor record when the compound appears as a whole. It helps protect wholesome chanda from collapsing into taṇhā by keeping the practice-supportive use explicit.
literal_meaning: basis of power grounded in desire

example_phrases.translation: a basis of power endowed with desire, composure, and activating constructions
example_phrases.notes: Shows the wholesome practical use of chanda within the bases-of-power framework.
